an10.13:1.3: Five lower fetters & five higher fetters.
an10.13:1.4: And which are the five lower fetters?
an10.13:1.5: Self-identification views, uncertainty, grasping at habits & practices, sensual desire, & ill will.
an10.13:1.6: These are the five lower fetters.
an10.13:2.1: And which are the five higher fetters?
an10.13:2.2: Passion for form, passion for what is formless, conceit, restlessness, & ignorance.
an10.13:2.3: These are the five higher fetters.
an10.13:2.4: And these are the ten fetters.”
